description:
Issue Summary:
Telemetry events are being processed later than expected.
Environment:
Test
Steps:
Generate telemetry event.
Monitor processing time.
Expected Result:
Processing should complete within one minute.
Actual Result:
Processing completed after three minutes.
Purpose:
Created for Jira workflow testing.

summary: Device registration failed during onboarding validation
description:
Issue Summary:
A test device failed during the registration process while validating the onboarding workflow.
Environment:
Test
Steps:
Register a test device.
Monitor onboarding status.
Expected Result:
Device should complete registration successfully.
Actual Result:
Registration stopped during validation.
Purpose:
Created for Jira workflow testing.
